document.docAuthor: Lelej, Arkady S., Proshchalykin, Maxim Yu. & Maharramov, Mahir M.
document.masterDocTitle: A review of the Mutillidae (Hymenoptera) of Azerbaijan

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A review of the Mutillidae (Hymenoptera) of Azerbaijan

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Federal Scientific Center of the East Asia Terrestrial Biodiversity, Far East Branch of the Russian Academy of Sciences, Vladivostok, 690022, Russia. lelej @ biosoil. ru; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0001 - 7501 - 0981

paragraph.treatmentCitationGroup:
Tropidotilla litoralis : Lelej 1985: 170
, ♀ , ♂ ( Azerbaijan );
Aliev & Lelej 1999: 45
, ♀ , ♂ ( Azerbaijan ).

Distribution. Azerbaijan, Albania , Algeria , Armenia , Austria , Belgium , Bulgaria , Croatia , Egypt , France , Georgia, Hungary , Jordan , Greece , Iran , Israel , Italy , Lebanon , North Macedonia, Montenegro , Morocco , Portugal , Romania , Russia (Crimea, North Caucasus, south of European part), Spain , Switzerland , Turkey , Turkmenistan , Ukraine .
